zh.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont是Yves IV de Beaumont-sur-Oise和Emma的兒子，於大約1040年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦波奧蒙吉素爾-瓦。他和Judith de Gournay至少有1個女兒。他去世於1083年9月16日在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利波蒙特享年44歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易波奧蒙吉萊-農亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Ives
meanings: Brenton, Cornish: God's grace or God's gift

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Count
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earl
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont was born about 1040, in Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France as the son of Yves IV de Beaumont-sur-Oise and Emma. He had at least 1 daughter with Judith de Gournay. He died on 16 September 1083, in Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 44, and was buried in Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont est né environ 1040, à Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, fils de Yves IV de Beaumont-sur-Oise et Emma. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Judith de Gournay. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1083, à Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont wurde um 1040 in Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich, als Sohn von Yves IV de Beaumont-sur-Oise und Emma geboren. Er hatte mit Judith de Gournay mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. September 1083 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont è nato il circa 1040 nel Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia come figlio di Yves IV de Beaumont-sur-Oise e Emma. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Judith de Gournay. Morì il 16 settembre 1083, nel Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumontは約1040年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼビーウモント-スル-オイゼでYves IV de Beaumont-sur-OiseとEmmaの息子として生まれた。彼はJudith de Gournayとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1083年9月16日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメビーウモントで44歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼビーウモント-レス-ノナインスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont(은)는 대략 1040년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 보몽-수-이스에서 Yves IV de Beaumont-sur-Oise(와)과 Emma의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Judith de Gournay(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1083년 9월 16일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 보몽에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 보몽-레스-넌언스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França filho de Yves IV de Beaumont-sur-Oise e Emma. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Judith de Gournay. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1083, em Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont родился около 1040 г. в местности бомонт-сур-оис, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Его родителей звали Yves IV de Beaumont-sur-Oise и Emma. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Judith de Gournay. Он умер 16 сентября 1083 г. в местности бомонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности бомонт-лес-нонеинс, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Ives III Count Beaumont-Sur-Oise de Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1040, en Beaumont-sur-Oise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia como hijo de Yves IV de Beaumont-sur-Oise y Emma. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Judith de Gournay. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1083, en Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
